The True Cost of Litigation:
Administrative Friction

Your intellect is designed to govern strategy,
not to fight against document carpentry.

poorExperience.title: The Risk of Human Error
poorExperience.description: In law, a formal error is fatal. Manual drafting in states of fatigue multiplies the risk of critical failures in documents where precision is non-negotiable.

opportunityCost.title: Economic Opportunity Cost
opportunityCost.description: Spending hours building a single brief is a financial error. Every minute dedicated to artisanal drafting is time stolen from senior management, the study of new cases, and the growth of your firm.

solution.title: You govern. The system executes.

We transform legal drafting from an exhausting artisanal task
into a high-precision engineering operation.

hitl.title: Human Sovereignty (HITL)
hitl.description: You act as the Architect of the strategy; the system executes the technical construction. No document is final without your explicit validation within the execution act (Human-in-the-Loop), ensuring that professional control always remains in your hands.

orchestration.title: Immediate Judicial Orchestration
orchestration.description: Eliminate the blank page block through algorithmic orchestration designed to structure solid arguments in seconds. What once required an entire afternoon of technical drafting is now resolved in minutes of executive review.

privacy.description: Infrastructure with institutional standards: your files are processed in a stateless environment and permanently deleted after execution. We do not store your secrets; we issue a single draft and destroy the evidence.

capacity.title: Industrial Dispatch Capacity

faq.title: Operational Clarity and Privacy Guarantee
faq.description: Absolute transparency about our engineering infrastructure and the treatment of your strategic information.

q1.question: How is Documentos.legal different from tools like ChatGPT?
q1.answer: Unlike a generic chatbot, we are a specialized document engineering infrastructure using Hexagonal Architecture. We don't rely on a single model; our native orchestrator dynamically selects the best engine (GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, or Gemini) for each section of the document. Each workflow is designed with judicial rigor, ensuring a structure and tone that a conventional chat cannot replicate.

q2.question: How secure are my data and strategy?
q2.answer: We implement the Incinerator Protocol: we treat client data as "toxic waste" that must be destroyed after processing. All infrastructure resides on Microsoft Cloudflare, where files are permanently deleted automatically after execution. Your strategic data is never used to train AI models nor exposed to the public internet.

q3.question: Can I trust the technical accuracy of the documents?
q3.answer: The system delivers drafts designed for immediate executive review, but you retain absolute sovereignty. We operate under a Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) model: you validate extracted data before generation and perform the final review before download.

q4.question: Do I need "Prompt Engineering" knowledge?
q4.answer: No; our job is the "Digital Plumbing". You only provide your strategic knowledge and key arguments; the complex engineering is executed in the background during the cycle to translate your intent into a professional document.

q5.question: Why don't you offer monthly subscriptions?
q5.answer: The subscription model is inefficient for legal engineering: you pay even if you generate nothing. We operate under a Single Execution Model: you authorize and pay only when you need a document. No hidden fees, no lock-ins, and no waste.

q1.question: What exactly is documentos.legal and how does it differ from a generic AI chat?
q1.answer: We are not a chat assistant, but an Industrial Document Engineering infrastructure. Unlike generic AIs that can hallucinate, our system uses an orchestration architecture (SAGA Pattern) and a multi-model router that selects the best intelligence for specific legal tasks. We focus on Cognitive Relief: eliminating the lawyer's administrative burden, not just generating text.

q2.question: What exactly does "Document Engineering" mean?
q2.answer: It is the application of software engineering principles to the creation of legal documents. This includes precise entity extraction, logical structuring of arguments, and format normalization, ensuring that the document is designed for immediate executive review before you review it.

q3.question: Which sectors is the infrastructure optimized for?
q3.answer: Currently, the system is calibrated exclusively for the legal sector: independent litigators, medium-sized firms, and in-house legal departments operating under Central and Latin American regulations.

q4.question: Do I need "prompt engineering" knowledge or advanced technology?
q4.answer: No. Our philosophy is "Time off site". We have replaced complex commands with an intuitive Strategic Intent Selector. You only define the legal objective (e.g., "Answer a lawsuit") and the system takes care of the technical execution.

q1.question: Are my confidential data and strategies secure?
q1.answer: We implement the Incinerator Protocol. We treat client information as toxic waste: it is processed and destroyed immediately. Your original files and drafts are physically deleted from our Cloudflare servers after execution.

q2.question: Are my documents used to train AI models?
q2.answer: Absolutely not. Our infrastructure is stateless. We do not store document "libraries" or feed global models with your intellectual property. Privacy is not an option, it is a technical constraint of our economic model.

q1.question: Can I trust the technical accuracy of the drafts?
q1.answer: The system is designed for rigor, but operates under the principle of Human Sovereignty (HITL). You are the architect; the AI is the builder. No document is considered final without your explicit validation through our side-by-side review interface.

q2.question: What is "Human-in-the-Loop" (HITL) and why is it mandatory?
q2.answer: It means the human is always at the center of the workflow. The system presents the evidence and the draft simultaneously for you to approve, reject, or refine each section. Our promise is "We grind, you govern".

q1.question: How do I contract the service if there are no subscriptions?
q1.answer: It is purely transactional. You upload your file, the system calculates complexity and issues a fixed price. Upon authorizing payment, engineering executes immediately. It's like buying a plane ticket: defined destination, closed price, single use.

q2.question: We are a large firm, do we need multiple accounts?
q2.answer: There are no 'user accounts'. The system authenticates the person authorizing the execution at that moment. For firms, we offer centralized billing, but the operation remains execution-by-execution, without user management or idle licenses.

q3.question: What happens if the complex document requires adjustments?
q3.answer: The price includes the guarantee of technical integrity. If the structure fails, our engineering support intervenes. However, strategic content is your responsibility under the Human Sovereignty model.

hero.title: Technical execution of procedural documents
hero.subtitle: Procedural acts executed under a single execution model
hero.description: You define high-level strategy; we process documentary carpentry with algorithmic rigor.

item1.title: Start Process
item1.action: Action: File a lawsuit or initial writ before a competent authority.
item1.copy: Start a new judicial process from your base document. The Engine structures the lawsuit or initial writ according to the applicable procedural logic, organizes facts, claims, and foundations, and generates a draft ready for review before filing.
item1.footer: One execution. One initial writ. No subsequent storage.

item2.title: Answer / Oppose
item2.action: Action: Formally respond to a lawsuit or action.
item2.copy: Generate the answer or opposition from the received document. The system extracts relevant facts, identifies claims, and structures the defense with technical order and argumentative coherence.
item2.footer: You validate. The Engine executes. The result is downloaded and the session is destroyed.

item3.title: Impugn / Appeal
item3.copy: Draft an appeal, revocation, or other means of challenge from the questioned resolution. The Engine organizes grievances, normative foundations, and specific petitions under an adequate formal structure.
item3.footer: One authorization. One resource. No re-executions.

item4.title: Request Measure
item4.action: Action: Request precautionary measures or urgent actions.
item4.copy: Request precautionary measures or other urgent actions with clear structure and precise foundation. The system integrates facts, danger in delay, and appearance of good law into a coherent and formally solid document.
item4.footer: Execution occurs only once. The final file concentrates all value.

item5.title: Expand / Modify Claim
item5.action: Action: Adjust the scope of an action already initiated.
item5.copy: Expand facts, modify claims, or adapt the lawsuit to new procedural elements. The Engine reorganizes the base writ maintaining argumentative consistency and normative structure.
item5.footer: It is not about editing a saved file. It is about executing a new specific transformation.

item6.title: Fulfill / Execute
item6.action: Action: Request compliance or execution phase of judgment.
item6.copy: Activate the compliance or execution phase of a final resolution. The system orders antecedents, executive title, and execution petitions under the corresponding procedural format.
item6.footer: A technical execution to activate legal execution.

item7.title: Inform / Prove
item7.action: Action: Present reports, evidence, or procedural writs.
item7.copy: Generate writs for offering, incorporation, or evidentiary development with clear structure and logical order. The Engine organizes annexes, references, and technical exposition to facilitate review and presentation.
item7.footer: An isolated procedural act. No history. No continuity.

item8.title: Desist / Settle
item8.action: Action: Formalize withdrawals, agreements, or transactions.
item8.copy: Formalize a withdrawal or transactional agreement with precise drafting coherent with the procedural state. The Engine structures clauses, manifestations, and homologation requests when applicable.
item8.footer: The document is executed. It is downloaded. The infrastructure is incinerated.

overview.description: We substitute artisan drafting with high-precision engineering processes, allowing you to focus your intellect on strategy while we process the technical load.

draftingEngine.hitl: You validate the extracted metadata and perform the final review before download; the system proposes, you govern.

infrastructure.totalDeletion: All client files and secrets are automatically eliminated after execution.
infrastructure.orchestration: We use a native orchestrator that dynamically selects the best models via Microsoft AI Foundry.
infrastructure.architecture: Our business logic is isolated from external providers to guarantee stability and infrastructure with institutional standards.

process.title: The Technical Execution Cycle
process.description: A transparent process designed to prioritize user sovereignty and data integrity at every stage.

step1.title: Ingestion and Strategic Command
step1.description: You provide the source material (PDF, DOCX) and define the strategic guideline through our intent selector. The system acts as your "Constructor," preparing the document architecture based on your specific instructions.

step2.title: Extraction and Validation
step2.description: Our architecture processes the source document and extracts key metadata and entities. Before proceeding, you validate this information via a split view (Source-Action Flow), ensuring the system does not work on incorrect data.

step3.title: Multi-LLM Orchestration and Construction
step3.description: The validated draft is processed by our native orchestrator, which dynamically selects the most suitable model (GPT-4o, Claude, or Gemini) via Microsoft AI Foundry. This engineering layer ensures impeccable judicial tone and solid argumentative structure.

step4.title: Tactical Download and Incineration
step4.description: The final outcome is delivered in your preferred format. Simultaneously, the Incinerator Protocol ensures the immediate destruction of all evidence and sources upon completion of execution, leaving your digital liability at zero.

whatsapp.title: The Trust Bridge
whatsapp.description: For firms requiring human validation before integrating new technical infrastructure.

protocol.title: Trust Signal: The Incinerator Protocol
protocol.description: Your security is not an option, it is an architectural law in our infrastructure.
protocol.guarantee: Guarantee: Stateless environment processing with immediate and definitive incineration of files and secrets upon execution closure.
protocol.infrastructure: Infrastructure: Operation 100% on Cloudflare Global Network with institutional compliance standards.

grant.title: The Founder’s Grant
grant.description: We don’t sell promises, we deliver immediate operational capacity. A validation execution is enabled to validate our technical rigor without initial financial commitment.

technologies.title: Bank-Grade Architecture and Native Execution
technologies.description: We are built on a proprietary infrastructure designed for stability, data sovereignty, and operational efficiency.

foundation.title: The Foundation: Hexagonal Architecture
foundation.description: Our infrastructure utilizes a Native Serverless Architecture that eliminates permanent server and database management. This modular structure allows us to flexibly orchestrate the most advanced AI models on the market (Gemini 1.5 Pro) via Cloudflare Workers, ensuring minimal latency and execution sovereignty.

security.title: Sovereignty and Security on the Edge
security.description: Our entire operation resides exclusively on the Cloudflare Global Edge Network. By processing documents in isolated, ephemeral Durable Objects, we guarantee that your strategic information never touches a persistent disk and remains protected under the Incinerator Protocol.

efficiency.title: Scale-to-Zero Efficiency
efficiency.description: We operate under a Scale-to-Zero financial and technical model. Our infrastructure only activates when you are processing a document, eliminating unnecessary costs and allowing us to offer a competitive cost advantage passed directly to our per-execution prices.

benefits.title: Institutional-Grade Multi-Jurisdiction Infrastructure
benefits.description: Documentos.legal is an infrastructure designed to operate with precision across multiple jurisdictions, eliminating the linguistic and administrative barriers of modern litigation.

benefit1.title: Native Bilingual Operation (Spanish / English)
benefit1.description: Our interface and processing engines operate seamlessly in both languages, allowing international legal teams to process evidence and generate drafts without cognitive friction.
benefit1.impact: Elimination of the language barrier in technical and strategic drafting.

benefit2.title: Jurisdiction-Agnostic Legal Infrastructure
benefit2.description: We operate on a jurisdiction-agnostic legal infrastructure, capable of adapting to procedural frameworks across Latin America through parameterization and human validation.
benefit2.impact: Tools designed for the reality of the litigator in specific local markets.

benefit3.title: "Scale-to-Zero" Operational Scalability
benefit3.description: Thanks to our cloud architecture, your firm can scale from one to hundreds of documents immediately without increasing fixed costs. You only pay for results generated through individual executions.
benefit3.impact: Big firm capacity for independent professionals and medium-sized teams.

benefit4.title: Unified Compliance and Security
benefit4.description: Regardless of location, every document is processed under the Incinerator Protocol, guaranteeing total data destruction after execution and compliance with Cloudflare security standards (ISO/SOC).
benefit4.impact: Infrastructure with institutional standards that transcends national borders.

hero.title: The infrastructure of cognitive relief
hero.subtitle: Judicial Grade Document Engineering
hero.description: Documentos.legal is a document engineering infrastructure designed to eradicate administrative friction in litigation. Under the Incinerator Protocol Doctrine, we process your documents and destroy private data after execution. We execute the heavy lifting; you govern the legal strategy.

mission.title: Our Mission: Cognitive Load Relief
mission.headline: We grind administrative work. You govern the law.
mission.description: The mission of Documentos.legal is to eradicate the administrative "operational infrastructure" that suffocates the practice of law. We do not sell artificial intelligence as an end; we sell time and institutional safety. Our reason for being is for the lawyer to regain their strategic capacity, delegating the drafting, paginating, and redaction of documents to a precision infrastructure that guarantees immediate cognitive relief.

vision.title: Our Vision: The Invisible Infrastructure
vision.headline: To be the standard of reliability for modern justice.
vision.description: We aspire to be the invisible and essential infrastructure that allows the legal system to function without operational friction. We do not seek to capture user attention, but to disappear within their workflow once the task is done. We visualize a future where law is practiced through human strategic decisions, supported by a technological architecture that processes drudgery and destroys evidence, reducing data liability to zero.

values.title: Architectural Values: The Pillars of Infrastructure

rigor.title: 1. Engineering Rigor: No "Black Boxes"
rigor.body: We reject the narrative of AI as magic. We operate under a Hexagonal Architecture that decouples legal logic from external interfaces, guaranteeing stability and auditable processes. We are not a third-party wrapper; we own our proprietary code "Chassis", built to offer predictability in high-responsibility environments.

sovereignty.title: 2. Human Sovereignty (HITL): Force Multiplier
sovereignty.body: Technology is a precision tool, never a substitute for expert judgment. Our "Human-in-the-Loop" architecture ensures you retain absolute control over final validation. The system performs the administrative heavy lifting so that the professional acts exclusively as the architect of the strategy.

trust.title: 3. Structural Trust: The Incinerator Protocol
trust.body: Security is not a promise, it is a technical impossibility of leakage. Through Binary Separation and the Incinerator Protocol, confidential data is processed in an ephemeral environment. By using armored Cloudflare infrastructure, we guarantee that evidence is physically destroyed after each session.

speed.title: 4. Speed Economy: Win, Don't Stay
speed.body: We don't measure success by "Time on Site", but by "Download Speed". We optimize the system so you get a perfect document and leave the infrastructure as soon as possible. Real value is measured in results: lawsuits won, contracts closed, and immediate cognitive relief.

origin.title: The Origin: Engineering for "Digital Plumbing"
origin.body: We were not born from theory, but from a raw observation: elite professionals consumed by administrative "drudgery". We identified that the gap between legal strategy and final drafting was a system error that had to be patched. Documentos.legal is the industrial answer to that friction; we don't sell "magic", we sell operational efficiency through infrastructure.

vba.title: The VBA Model: Stability and Scale-to-Zero
vba.body: We are a Strategic Business Unit (SBU) of Cyboring Technologies LLC, operating under the Venture Builder Autonomous (VBA) model. We are not an experimental startup, but the product of an "Agentic Assembly Line" designed to produce industrial-grade software. Our "Scale-to-Zero" architecture guarantees that we only consume resources when you generate revenue, ensuring asymmetric financial viability against traditional competitors.

philosophy.title: Philosophy: The Economy of Apathy
philosophy.body: We reject the "Time on Site" metric. We optimize for download speed: success is measured by how quickly you can leave our infrastructure with a perfect legal result. We are here so you can stop writing and start governing.

ephemeral.title: Immediate Deletion: Ephemeral Data Persistence
ephemeral.body: Under the Incinerator Protocol, confidential information is destroyed after execution. Physical deletion at the infrastructure level in Cloudflare ensures that your data liability is reduced to zero after every work session.

availability.title: 99.9%+: Availability on Armored Infrastructure
availability.body: We operate on Microsoft Cloudflare to offer bank-grade resilience and enterprise standard compliance. Our native hexagonal architecture ensures unwavering stability and massive scalability for critical litigation processes.

zero_storage.title: 0% Secrets Storage
zero_storage.body: We reject the traditional data "warehouse" model; we are an industrial processing pipeline. Your information is not saved to be exploited, it is transformed: once the result is delivered, the system physically destroys any trace of the original source.

speed.title: Maximum Download Speed
speed.body: Our success metric is "Time Off Site". We optimize the system so that the professional spends the least amount of time possible on the infrastructure, achieving drafts designed for immediate executive review in a fraction of the usual time.

standards.title: Certifications of Robustness and Human Sovereignty

hitl.title: HITL Guarantee: You Govern, We Grind
hitl.body: At Documentos.legal, the human expert retains absolute sovereignty over every document produced. The system operates under strict Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) control, where no draft is finalized without your explicit validation. This architecture allows the professional to act as the Architect of the strategy while the system acts as the Constructor, ensuring that the result is a draft designed for immediate executive review before download.

agnostic.title: Multi-Provider Agnostic Intelligence
agnostic.body: Our infrastructure depends on neither a single provider nor a specific model. We operate via direct orchestration of latest generation LLM models, consumed via native APIs and dynamically selected based on the technical suitability of each task. This guarantees precision, operational continuity, and absence of technological dependency.

resilience.title: Infrastructure Resilience: Cloudflare and Hexagonal Design
resilience.body: We are built on Cloudflare's serverless infrastructure, guaranteeing enterprise-grade security and a "Scale-to-Zero" architecture that eliminates unnecessary costs. We implement a native Hexagonal Architecture to decouple legal logic from external interfaces, ensuring our infrastructure is as stable and predictable as the justice system itself.

incineratorProtocol.title: The Incinerator Protocol Doctrine: The End of Data Liability

item1.title: Ephemeral Processing of Confidential Information
item1.description: At Documentos.legal, confidentiality is not a contractual promise; it is a technical impossibility. Under the Incinerator Protocol, all confidential information is destroyed after execution. We are not a data warehouse, but a processing pipeline: files are ingested, transformed, and evidence is physically deleted from our servers automatically.

item2.title: The Binary Split Architecture
item2.description: Our infrastructure strictly divides business data (billing and access) from product data (your secrets). While your account remains secure on our infrastructure, the processing environment is totally ephemeral and vanishes upon session termination.

item3.title: Deletion guaranteed by infrastructure, not code
item3.description: Data destruction is engraved in the DNA of our Cloudflare cloud. Lifecycle policies delete files after execution, without human intervention and without exceptions. If the server is empty, your legal liability drops to zero. We fix your documents and destroy the evidence.

cta.title: Eliminate operational friction today
cta.subtitle: Your first strategic draft is 60 seconds away
cta.description: Start an ephemeral execution now and validate download speed and Incinerator Protocol rigor without initial financial commitment. No subscriptions, no "projects"; just precision engineering for immediate legal results.

securityModal.title: Security and Incineration Protocols
bullets: No storage on disk, databases or histories.
The final document is generated only once.
After download, all material is automatically incinerated.
No accounts, persistent sessions or subsequent recovery.
The system does not keep evidence. The act ends and disappears.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: Cyboring Hexagonal Technologies LLC ("Cyboring", "we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our document engineering infrastructure and related services.

informationCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationCollect.intro: We collect information that you provide directly to us and information we obtain automatically when you use our Services:

items.personal: Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, billing information, and professional details you provide when creating an account or using our services.
items.usage: Usage Data: Information about how you interact with our infrastructure, including documents processed, features used, and time spent on the infrastructure.
items.device: Device Information: IP address, browser type, operating system, and device identifiers.
items.cookies: Cookies and Tracking: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience and analyze infrastructure usage.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.intro: We use the information we collect to:

items.provide: Provide, maintain, and improve our document engineering services.
items.improve: Develop new features and enhance user experience.
items.communicate: Send you technical notices, updates, security alerts, and support messages.
items.security: Detect, prevent, and address technical issues and security threats.
items.legal: Comply with legal obligations and enforce our terms of service.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. All data is processed within Microsoft Cloudflare's enterprise-grade infrastructure with SOC 2 Type II certification. Your documents and strategic information are encrypted in transit and at rest, and are never exposed to the public internet or used to train AI models.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing and Disclosure
dataSharing.intro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:

items.providers: Service Providers: With trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our infrastructure, subject to confidentiality obligations.
items.legal: Legal Requirements: When required by law, subpoena, or other legal process, or to protect the rights and safety of Cyboring, our users, or others.
items.business: Business Transfers: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of the transaction.

yourRights.title: Your Rights and Choices
yourRights.intro: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information:

items.access: Access: Request access to the personal information we hold about you.
items.correction: Correction: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete information.
items.deletion: Deletion: Request deletion of your personal information, subject to certain exceptions.
items.portability: Portability: Request a copy of your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
items.optOut: Opt-Out: Opt out of marketing communications at any time.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to collect information about your browsing activities. You can control cookies through your browser settings, though disabling certain cookies may limit your ability to use some features of our infrastructure.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.content: Our Services are not directed to children under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately.

changes.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date. Your continued use of our Services after any changes indicates your acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introduction: Welcome to Cyboring. These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Cyboring document engineering infrastructure and related services ("Services") provided by Cyboring Hexagonal Technologies LLC ("Cyboring", "we", "us", or "our"). Please read these Terms carefully before using our Services.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using our Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not access or use our Services. If you are using the Services on behalf of an organization, you represent and warrant that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

description.title: 2. Description of Services
description.content: Cyboring provides a document engineering infrastructure that uses artificial intelligence to help professionals create, analyze, and process documents. Our Services include document generation, metadata extraction, compliance checking, and other related features. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of our Services at any time.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.intro: To access certain features of our Services, you must create an account. When you create an account, you agree to:

items.accurate: Provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration.
items.security: Maintain the security of your password and account credentials.
items.notify: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account.
items.responsible: Be responsible for all activities that occur under your account.

acceptableUse.title: 4. Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.intro: You agree not to use our Services to:

items.illegal: Violate any applicable laws, regulations, or third-party rights.
items.harmful: Upload or transmit viruses, malware, or other harmful code.
items.infringe: Infringe upon intellectual property rights of others.
items.interfere: Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of our Services.
items.unauthorized: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems or other users' accounts.

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: The Services and all content, features, and functionality are owned by Cyboring and are protected by international copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, and other intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, or lease any part of our Services without our prior written consent.

userContent.title: 6. User Content
userContent.content: You retain ownership of any documents and content you upload to our infrastructure ("User Content"). By uploading User Content, you grant Cyboring a limited license to process your content solely for the purpose of providing our Services to you. We do not use your User Content to train our AI models or share it with third parties except as necessary to provide the Services.

payment.title: 7. Payment Terms
payment.content: Certain features of our Services require payment. You agree to pay all fees associated with your chosen plan. Fees are non-refundable except as required by law or as explicitly stated in our refund policy. We reserve the right to change our pricing with reasonable notice.

termination.title: 8. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your access to our Services immediately, without prior notice, for any reason, including if you breach these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Services will cease immediately. You may also terminate your account at any time by contacting us.

disclaimer.title: 9. Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.content: THE SERVICES ARE PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT. CYBORING DOES NOT WARRANT THAT THE SERVICES WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, ERROR-FREE, OR SECURE.

liability.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, CYBORING SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, OR GOODWILL, ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OF THE SERVICES. OUR TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU PAID US IN THE TWELVE MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM.

indemnification.title: 11. Indemnification
indemnification.content: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Cyboring and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, and expenses (including attorneys' fees) arising out of your use of the Services, your User Content, or your violation of these Terms.

governingLaw.title: 12. Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, United States, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising from these Terms shall be resolved in the state or federal courts located in Delaware.

changes.title: 13. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will provide notice of material changes by posting the updated Terms on our website and updating the "Last Updated" date. Your continued use of the Services after changes become effective constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.

contact.title: 14. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
